[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111 a
1 1111111 a
2 1111111 a
3 1111111 a
4 1111111 a
5 1111111 a
6 1110101 5
7 1011010 4

01 10 0111111 6
12 21 0100001 2
23 32 1100001 3
34 43 1100001 3
45 54 1010000 2

67 76 1110000 3
70 07 1110000 3

02 20 1100001 3
13 31 0101001 3
24 42 1100001 3
35 53 1001000 2
46 64 1110101 5 match 6
57 75 1010000 2
60 06 1110101 5 match 6
71 17 0110000 2

14 41 0110101 4
25 52 1000000 1
36 63 1100001 3
47 74 1110000 3
50 05 1011010 4 match 7
61 16 0110101 4
72 27 1100000 2

15 51 0011010 3
26 62 1100001 3
37 73 1100000 2
